title: Remember His Wonders

sections.label: Intro
lines: Sing His name, oh let it rise,
Through the heavens, through the skies.
Dance in faith, let praises flow,
Feel the fire, let it glow.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Call on His name, the One we adore,
Tell of His wonders, forevermore.
Seek His presence, don’t turn away,
He’s our fortress, our light, our stay.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Remember the promise, the oath of His love,
Signed with the heavens, sealed from above.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Sing of His glory, proclaim His might,
Every promise holds true, through day and night.
He led us through shadows, turned dark to light,
Forever faithful, His love ignites.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: He called the stars, and they took their place,
Opened the waters, unveiled His grace.
Our hearts rejoice, His mercy reigns,
He lifts the broken, He breaks the chains.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: From ages past to the days ahead,
His power endures, His word is said.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Sing of His glory, proclaim His might,
Every promise holds true, through day and night.
He led us through shadows, turned dark to light,
Forever faithful, His love ignites.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Oh, hearts that seek, you will find,
The path of grace, the eternal sign.
Lift your voice, let it be known,
Through every trial, we are His own.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Sing of His glory, proclaim His might,
Every promise holds true, through day and night.
He led us through shadows, turned dark to light,
Forever faithful, His love ignites.

sections.label: Outro
lines: His love ignites, oh, His love ignites…
Forever faithful, His love ignites.

epigraph: Remember his marvellous works that he hath done
styleNote: Soft Synth Pads Building · Drum Fills Increasing Intensity · Minimal Instrumentation
